title: cinii-mcp: An MCP server for the CiNii Research API
description: A FastMCP stdio server that exposes the CiNii Research API (National Institute of Informatics) as seven tools for AI clients: search of journal articles, books, dissertations, KAKEN research projects, and researchers, plus a cross-type search and single-record lookup over Japanese-language scholarship. Works with any MCP-compatible client. Requires a free CiNii application ID.
